message:
fix: X25519 key validation, supervisor restart backoff, OAuth1 nonce, and SSE parser hardening

fcp-crypto: add X25519 public key validation (reject zero/low-order
points), constant-time key comparison. Update benchmarks and tests.

fcp-host/supervisor: add exponential backoff with jitter for connector
restart after crash, preventing tight restart loops.

fcp-oauth: use cryptographic random nonce for OAuth1 signatures instead
of timestamp-based, preventing nonce reuse within the same second.

fcp-streaming/sse: add max_data_bytes enforcement in parse loop
(was only in constructor).

fcp-webhook: add Slack request timestamp replay protection with
configurable tolerance window.

Also: minor fixes in fcp-protocol session transcript, fcp-store
quarantine/repair, fcp-ratelimit, fcp-tailscale tag validation,
fcp-conformance session vectors, and fuzz targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
